recent.author: Sarah K.
recent.text: Came in for yogurt and milk — entire dairy section was empty. Third time this month. Going to Kroger from now on.

recent.author: David M.
recent.text: Great floral selection for Mother's Day but checkout was a 20 min wait. Only 3 lanes open.

recent.author: Priya R.
recent.text: Janet at customer service was incredible — helped me find a substitute when my usual brand was out.

recent.author: Mike T.
recent.text: No Chobani, no Fairlife, no Horizon. What is going on with dairy lately?

recent.author: Linda B.
recent.text: Memorial Day TV deals look great. Wish electronics had more staff to answer questions.
